## Calculations.IConfectionScaleOptions.roundingMode property

Rounding mode for scaled count (default: 'round') - 'round': Round to nearest integer - 'floor': Round down - 'ceil': Round up

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly roundingMode?: 'round' | 'floor' | 'ceil';
```
